creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: Besides, seatd-launch if run as root keeps root for the target command. river/phoc/gamescope don't barf if run as root unlike sway/hikari/wayfire/cage/labwc. And running as root can be useful for debugging (bypass DRM_AUTH), recovery (single user mode) and in some embedded scenarios (root shell instead of sudo/doas).
